title: Count the Repetitions
hints: Notice that matching s2 repeatedly within S1 follows a repeating pattern. Track your position in s1 and how many s2 copies you have completed.
Since s1 is short, the state (position in s1, copies of s2 matched) must eventually repeat. Detect this cycle to skip large portions of the simulation.
Calculate how many full cycles occur, multiply by the s2 copies gained per cycle, then simulate the remaining steps for the final answer.
